title: Permission to restrict members from use/request of App Marketplace apps
excerpt: Requesting a member permission at the Workspace level or administration level to restrict use/request of app marketplace apps. It would be beneficial to have selective ability to allow or restrict based on a users role. …

posts.author: REPP1 (Ron Reppucci)
posts.cookedHtml: Requesting a member permission at the Workspace level or administration level to restrict use/request of app marketplace apps. It would be beneficial to have selective ability to allow or restrict based on a users role. (Admin, Workspace owner, Workspace member, etc.)

posts.author: Jayson (Jayson Nickols)
posts.cookedHtml: As the administrator for our organization, I wholeheartedly agree that we need the capability to restrict access to the marketplace. Users can get a little over zealous and want to try everything they see because it’s “free”. Meanwhile administrators are getting flooded with requests to install the app. This is very annoying and counter productive.
